artPrompt: A surge of hasty goblins charging forward in a wide landscape wave, weapons raised, ember-red and flame-orange washes streaming behind them like a tide of fire against night-black smoke. Confetti and sparks blur in their wake, overturned ballot boxes scattering underfoot. All forward motion and emboldened fury. The people's mandate as a stampede, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Sweeping Mandate
text:
Creatures you control get +2/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.
Mandate — If you control five or more Voters, they also gain trample and you may roll a six-sided die. On a 6, take an extra turn after this one. (It really was a landslide.)
flavorText: The people have spoken. Mostly they said "snacks," but a mandate is a mandate.
